name: Kari-Kare (Meat and Vegetable Stew in Peanut
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Stewing beef (optional-to make a meatier dish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place hocks or oxtail pieces in a large pot. Add enough water to cover. Bring to boil, lower heat and simmer for 1-1/2 hours or until tender.
2. If using achute water, soak 1 tablespoon of achute seeds in water 30 minutes. Squeeze seeds between your thumb and fingers until the water turns red. Strain and set red water aside. OR Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a skillet and sauté achute seeds until oil turns red, discard seeds. Use oil to sauté rest of ingredients.
3. Heat oil in a skillet and saute garlic and onions. Add cooked meat and 2 cups of the broth (save the rest for other uses). Add achute water. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in peanut butter and toasted rice powder, bring back to simmer and cook, stirring for 5 minutes.
5. Add green beans and eggplant. Cook 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally. Correct the seasonings.
6. Serve with hot rice and bagoong, plain or sauteed.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Cooking Time: 2 hours
Serves: 4-6
